# Character generator (`bin/chargen.bin`) — third-party, LGPL-3.0-or-later

`bin/chargen.bin` is NOT part of this project's own (MIT-licensed) code.
It is included verbatim from the MEGA65 Open ROMs project and is licensed
separately, under the **GNU Lesser General Public License v3.0 or later**.

## What it is
- File: `bin/chargen.bin` (4096 bytes)
- Identical (byte for byte) to `chargen_openroms.rom` from MEGA65 Open ROMs
  - sha256: `5e3451466841b93df7e01e4b635b07b8d8633351bae483b1961d96b3131186e7`
- Glyphs: the **PXL font, created by Retrofan**, included in Open ROMs with
  the author's permission under LGPL-3.0.

## Copyright and license
- Copyright Paul Gardner-Stephen, 2019.
- Copyright Roman Standzikowski (FeralChild64), 2019-2021.
- PXL font by Retrofan.
- Source project: MEGA65 Open ROMs — https://github.com/MEGA65/open-roms
- Licensed under LGPL-3.0-or-later. Full texts in this folder:
  `COPYING.LESSER` (LGPL additional permissions) + `COPYING` (GPL v3).
  Upstream notice: `LICENSE-megabase-notice.txt`.

## Note on licensing scope
The rest of this repository (KERNAL, build scripts, tests) is MIT, and the
BASIC derives from Microsoft's MIT-licensed source. This single file
(`bin/chargen.bin`) is the only LGPL-licensed component, kept isolated here
and clearly labelled. It is a temporary bridge; replacing it with an own
character set is on the roadmap.
